data_exfiltration.description: CSS injection for data exfiltration -- use CSS selectors and url() to leak page content character by character to attacker server

probes.description: Basic CSS injection probe -- if value appears in style attribute or <style> block, confirms CSS injection via OOB callback
@import injection -- close existing rule and inject external stylesheet import for full CSS control

attribute_selector_exfil.description: CSS attribute selector exfiltration -- leak CSRF tokens, input values, or hidden field content via CSS selectors with url() callbacks

probes.description: CSRF token exfiltration via CSS attribute selector -- fires callback when token starts with 'a'. Repeat for each character position to extract full token.
